product_overview: OmniTrack AI is an autonomous multi-agent supply chain resilience platform that detects disruptions faster and recommends mitigations using four specialized AI agents, real-time telemetry, scenario simulation, and explainable AI. The product provides dashboards, an AI Copilot, a scenario marketplace, voice and AR interfaces, and operational APIs for integration.
core_goals: Detect supply chain disruptions early using multi-agent AI and real-time telemetry
Accelerate response with recommended mitigation strategies and impact assessments
Provide explainable AI outputs and traceability for decisions
Enable interactive what-if scenario simulation and a marketplace for reusable scenarios
Support real-time operations (SSE/WebSocket/IoT) with secure role-based access control
Expose analytics, export capabilities, and developer-friendly APIs
Support voice and AR interfaces for operational workflows
Operate securely and scalably on AWS serverless infrastructure

features.name: Landing Page / Interactive Demo
features.description: Public landing page with hero visualization and an interactive demo that loads demo scenarios and supply chain config to showcase product capabilities.
user_flows: GET /api/marketplace/scenarios -> Receive 200 with list of demo scenarios -> GET /api/supply-chain/config -> Receive 200 with demo config -> Render interactive command center demo
GET /api/marketplace/scenarios -> Receive 500 server error -> GET /api/supply-chain/config -> Receive 200 with demo config -> Fall back to local demo assets (demo mode)

features.name: Authentication & Session Management
features.description: User signup, login, logout, session retrieval and token refresh using NextAuth-backed endpoints and RBAC for protected routes.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/signup with valid registration data -> Receive 201 Created -> POST /api/auth/login with email/password -> Receive 200 with JWT and refresh token -> GET /api/auth/me with JWT -> Receive 200 with user profile and roles

POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 Unauthorized -> POST /api/auth/refresh with invalid/expired refresh token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized (client prompts user to re-authenticate)

features.name: Supply Chain Dashboard (Real-time)
features.description: Authenticated dashboard showing real-time D3 visualizations of nodes, sensor telemetry, agent controls, and risk alerts via SSE/WebSocket fallback.
user_flows: GET /api/auth/me with JWT -> Receive 200 user profile -> GET /api/supply-chain/nodes -> Receive 200 with node list and metadata -> GET /api/supply-chain/stream to open SSE -> Receive continuous SSE events of telemetry

GET /api/supply-chain/stream without valid session -> Receive 401 Unauthorized -> GET /api/supply-chain/nodes with JWT -> Receive 200 nodes -> Poll GET /api/supply-chain/nodes every 5s as SSE fallback

features.name: AI Agents (Info, Scenario, Strategy, Impact)
features.description: Four specialized agents (Info, Scenario, Strategy, Impact) exposed via agent endpoints to run anomaly detection, simulations, mitigation planning, and impact assessment.
user_flows: POST /api/agents/info with time-series sensor payload -> Receive 200 with anomaly list and aggregated signals -> POST /api/agents/scenario with selected anomaly and parameters -> Receive 200 with simulation results -> POST /api/agents/strategy with simulation results -> Receive 200 with mitigation recommendations -> POST /api/agents/impact with chosen mitigations -> Receive 200 with business impact assessment

POST /api/agents/scenario with malformed parameters -> Receive 400 Bad Request -> POST /api/agents/info while rate limit exceeded -> Receive 429 Too Many Requests (client surfaces error and suggests retry/backoff)

features.name: Scenario Simulation (User-driven)
features.description: What-if scenario creation and execution via the scenario run API and agent simulation endpoints with result visualization and export options.
user_flows: POST /api/scenarios/run with scenario parameters -> Receive 202 Accepted with simulationId -> POST /api/agents/scenario with simulationId and parameters -> Receive 200 with simulation results -> POST /api/agents/impact with simulation results -> Receive 200 with impact analysis -> GET /api/copilot/analytics/export -> Receive 200 with downloadable report

POST /api/scenarios/run with missing required parameters -> Receive 400 Bad Request -> POST /api/agents/scenario with that simulationId -> Receive 404 Not Found (client shows validation errors and highlights missing fields)

features.name: AI Copilot Analytics
features.description: Dashboard and export endpoints that surface Copilot usage, conversation metrics, and intent classification trends for operational and product analytics.
user_flows: GET /api/copilot/analytics/dashboard with analytics query params -> Receive 200 with metrics and time-series -> GET /api/copilot/analytics/export with date range -> Receive 200 with CSV/JSON export

GET /api/copilot/analytics/dashboard with expired token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized -> POST /api/auth/refresh with refresh token -> Receive 200 with new token -> Retry GET /api/copilot/analytics/dashboard -> Receive 200 with metrics
GET /api/copilot/analytics/export during high load -> Receive 503 Service Unavailable -> Client schedules retry and informs user

features.name: Marketplace (Browse & Discover Scenarios)
features.description: Scenario marketplace listing community and official scenario templates with search, filters and rating metadata for users to import and customize.
user_flows: GET /api/marketplace/scenarios?industry=manufacturing&sort=rating -> Receive 200 with filtered list of scenarios -> User selects scenario and loads detail page (client-side)
GET /api/marketplace/scenarios -> Receive 429 Too Many Requests -> Client shows rate-limit message and allows user to retry or view cached results

features.name: Explainability & Decision Transparency
features.description: Explainability endpoint to analyze agent decisions and present decision trees, contribution breakdowns and confidence levels to users.
user_flows: POST /api/explainability/analyze with decisionId and context -> Receive 200 with explanation payload (decision tree, agent contributions, confidence scores) -> Render explainability visualization
POST /api/explainability/analyze with unknown decisionId -> Receive 404 Not Found -> Client prompts user to select a valid decision or re-run the scenario/agent

features.name: Sustainability Tracking
features.description: Dashboards and KPIs for carbon footprint and environmental metrics derived from supply chain node telemetry and analytics.
user_flows: GET /api/supply-chain/nodes -> Receive 200 with nodes including emissions attributes -> GET /api/copilot/analytics/dashboard?metric=sustainability -> Receive 200 with aggregated sustainability KPIs -> Display trends and alerts

GET /api/supply-chain/nodes -> Receive 500 Internal Server Error -> GET /api/copilot/analytics/dashboard -> Receive 503 Service Unavailable -> Client displays offline sustainability summary and suggests retry or contact support

features.name: Voice Interface
features.description: Voice command endpoint for audio-to-intent processing, enabling natural-language operational commands that trigger agents or surface information.
user_flows: POST /api/voice/command with audio payload (base64) -> Receive 200 with transcription and intent -> POST /api/agents/info with resolved intent parameters -> Receive 200 with requested data or action confirmation
POST /api/voice/command with noisy/invalid audio -> Receive 400 Bad Request with transcription error -> Client prompts user to retry or type command

features.name: AR Visualization
features.description: Augmented reality visualization that fetches spatial node data and configuration to render 3D supply chain topology for interactive exploration.
user_flows: GET /api/supply-chain/nodes -> Receive 200 with node coordinates and metadata -> GET /api/supply-chain/config -> Receive 200 with spatial/rendering config -> Render AR scene with node overlays

GET /api/supply-chain/nodes without valid session -> Receive 401 Unauthorized -> GET /api/auth/me with valid credentials -> Receive 200 user profile -> Retry GET /api/supply-chain/nodes -> Receive 200 and render AR scene

project.name: omnitrack-ai
project.description: Autonomous multi-agent AI platform for supply chain resilience. Four specialized AI agents collaborate to detect disruptions 10x faster and respond 50x faster than traditional systems.

pages.description: Landing page with hero section, interactive demo, command center
Real-time supply chain visualization with agent controls and metrics
Scenario marketplace with search, filters, and ratings
Voice interface for supply chain commands

agents: POST /api/agents/info - Info Agent (anomaly detection, data aggregation)
supply_chain: GET /api/supply-chain/stream - Stream real-time supply chain data (SSE)

agents: info-agent.ts - Data aggregation and anomaly detection

categories.ui: Button, Card, Label, Input, Slider, Select, Badge, Alert

categories.dashboard: Supply chain visualization, node details, agent controls, metrics

categories.copilot: Chat interface, message list, suggested prompts, analytics

categories.marketplace: Scenario browser, search, filters, ratings, detail views

categories.landing: Hero section, feature cards, agent capabilities, command center

key_features: Multi-agent AI system with 4 specialized agents
Real-time supply chain monitoring via IoT sensors
AI Copilot with natural language interface
Demo mode for testing without backend
